loungeAccess.conditions: 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year (2/quarter) plus a complimentary Priority Pass membership giving 4 free international lounge visits per year; USD 35 per visit thereafter and for guests. Kotak revised the lounge program terms effective 1 April 2026 — confirm current visit counts directly with Kotak before relying on them.

milestoneBenefits.reward: Up to ₹27,000 in White Pass value, redeemable for travel, luxury brands and curated experiences

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: No, it carries a ₹3,000 + GST joining fee and ₹3,000 + GST annual fee, waived if you spend ₹5 lakh or more in the preceding year.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: It suits frequent domestic travellers who value lounge access — 8 domestic visits plus Priority Pass-based international access is strong for a ₹3,000 fee — but the White Pass reward structure only pays off at high annual spend levels (₹12 lakh+), so occasional spenders may not see much extra value.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: Frequent domestic flyers who want easy airport lounge access at a moderate annual fee, and high spenders who can hit the White Pass milestone thresholds.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: Yes, it can be linked to UPI apps for payments.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: Yes — up to 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits a year (2 per quarter) plus a complimentary Priority Pass membership for 4 free international visits a year. Kotak revised the lounge program terms effective 1 April 2026, so confirm current visit counts before travel.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: Kotak does not publish an exact minimum for this card; as a mid-premium travel card it generally requires a stable, moderate-to-high income and a good credit score.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Low spenders who won't reach the ₹5 lakh annual spend threshold for the fee waiver, or those who prefer straightforward cashback over a milestone-based White Pass rewards system.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: Kotak White Reserve for a higher tier of lounge/travel benefits, or Axis Magnus/ICICI Sapphiro for stronger travel rewards at a higher fee.

categories.label: Annual total spend (for White Pass milestone)
